channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Commercial fridge parked on road indefinitely, 24th March
item.description:
The butchers, The Meat Plaza have parked a refrigeration truck on Stamford Grove West - presumably without a suitable permit. This is a commercial refrigeration unit and should not be there. It is being used as an extension to the business premises.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Oldhill Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish, 24th March
item.description:
Regular dumping area should put a sign up

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 9, Richborough Close, St Mary Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly-tipped toilet left on street, 24th March
item.description:
A toilet has been illegally dumped on the street opposite Wharton House. St Saviours Estate. Maltby Street. The item appears to have been left for weeks. Please arrange for removal as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Millstream Road, Old Kent Road, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping outside 50 Riverdale Road, 24th March
item.description:
Dumped rubbish – open bins Rubbish exposed to vermin Including fresh food & papers Lowers the aesthetic appeal of the Street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Riverdale Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Flytipped glives, 24th March
item.description:
The person collecting the recycling bottles has thrown their blue gloves into my bin. This is the second time it has been done. My bin is for bottles, plastic, etc… not latex gloves.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 77, Star Lane, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned vehicles, 24th March
item.description:
Abandoned vehicle been in situ for 5 months being used by drug users causing ASB. Car is crash damaged & a hazard. Recently taxed but not used by owner.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tynemouth Road, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of st Julian’s Road, 24th March
item.description:
People have dumped their rubbish in our building bins- flytipping and also left beds and mattresses

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): St Julians Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Large - More than a van load

item.title: Abandoned dustbin, 24th March
item.description:
Abandoned dustbin on pavement outside 34 Bouverie Rd for a number of weeks, being used as a public waste bin. It is almost completely full of litter, which includes dog waste. It is not being collected by refuse services and nobody has claimed bin.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Bouverie Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tree limb decaying, 24th March
item.description:
This bough is overhanging the footpath near the children’s playground in Cator Park. It’s been steadily deteriorating over the winter and you can see from the photo. The bark is breaking away. Sooner rather than later, most likely in the summer, this bough will break and fall onto the footpath. Consequences speak for themselves

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bailes Place, New Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress dumped on street, 24th March
item.description:
Mattress dumped

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wilberforce Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish dumped on grass verge, 24th March
item.description:
I reported this issue on 16 March (see first photo). Not only does it remain unaddressed, but additional items have since been dumped on top of the wood (as shown in photos 2 and 3). I regularly do my part by litter picking in this area; however, I do not have the means to clear or dispose of this waste. I would therefore be grateful if you could arrange for your contractors to attend and remove it as soon as possible.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Wallhouse Road, Slade Green, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped rubbish on the street, 24th March
item.description:
Rubbish dumped on the street on Cecilia Road again, this is a constant problem on Cecilia Road rubbish gets dumped on this street every week. This is the second week running that rubbish has been dumped here again from a local restaurant.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Cecilia Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dump of commercial waste on road, 24th March
item.description:
Another regular dump of rubbish has appeared on Bazalgette Way, just before the bend after Southmere lake.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bazalgette Way, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: One swing has been taken, 24th March
item.description:
There were 2 swings for older children now one has disappeared- as the Easter holiday is approaching the church playgroup is busier and children are off school Could the swing please be replaced for all to use Thank you
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkhill Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Washing Machine Fly tipped, 24th March
item.description:
Washing Machine; cupboard unit & large wood panel dumped next to large blue recycling bins.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): John Wilson Street, Woolwich
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Tagging, 24th March
item.description:
Tagging

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Silver Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Inoffensive up to 2 metres off the ground

item.title: Tagging, 24th March
item.description:
Tagging

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Silver Street, Enfield
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Inoffensive up to 2 metres off the ground

item.title: Outside 12/14 Mutrix Road, 24th March
item.description:
There is a leak in the road - it’s been like this for a while - several months, but in last week or so the water running down the road is not stopping - assume a Thames Water burst pipe or something underneath. Concern of under road damage if left uninspected. The picture taken at night helps to show the shine of the water on the road where it comes out of one hole and then flows down the road.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 20, Mutrix Road, Kilburn, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish blown all over street/under cars, 24th March
item.description:
Combination of flytipping and rubbish dumped on street

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Belfast Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Inbetween the slow signs on road, 24th March
item.description:
Large pot hole getting bigger been there for over teo months large stones coming out wouks be great to have it fixed pkease

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Admiral Seymour Road, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet
